name: Almond Coconut Twinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add butter and blend well until crumbly.
3. Stir in vanilla and almond extract.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix thoroughly.
5. Fold in the flaked coconut until evenly distributed.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool completely on the baking sheet before removing.
